/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libdetection_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libdetection_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/detection_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/detection_msgs/msg/detail/detection2_d__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/detection_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/detection_msgs/msg/detail/detection2_d_array__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/detection_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libdetection_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
